detailedDescription:
Flagship-level 1440p performance at a mid-range price.
Delivers RTX 2080 Ti performance at a fraction of the cost.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: GA104 | Architecture: Ampere
CUDA Cores: 5888 | RT Cores: 46 | Tensor Cores: 184
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 448 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4a, 1x HDMI 2.1
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 4.0)
Recommended PSU: 650W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
